SHORT NAME: RNDRNG_PHYSN_NPI 

LONG NAME: RNDRNG_PHYSN_NPI 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field appears on both the revenue center and base claim files. Medicare needs to identify primary 
physicians/practitioners of service not only for use in standard claims transactions but also for review,
